Name: polarwarp_sentinel1
Title: Polar warp capability
Description: There can be a long wait for the next satellite image to be received during which sea ice can move a considerable distance. The DESIDE Image Warp Capability transforms the current satellite image using a sea ice drift forecast to simulate what the ice in a region should look like in the future. The algorithm uses the neXtSIM model for ice drift forecasts up to six hours ahead.
